schema.name: TmsSensorData
schema.description: Traffic Measurement System (TMS) sensor reading from the Finnish national road network operated by Fintraffic. Each message represents a single computational sensor measurement at a TMS station, delivered in real time via the Digitraffic MQTT stream at wss://tie.digitraffic.fi/mqtt on topic tms-v2/{stationId}/{sensorId}. TMS stations measure vehicle counts (passings) and average speeds aggregated over rolling or fixed time windows. See https://www.digitraffic.fi/en/road-traffic/ for full documentation.

station_id.description: TMS station numeric identifier as assigned by Fintraffic. There are over 500 TMS stations across the Finnish road network. Example: 23001.

sensor_id.description: Computational sensor identifier within the TMS station. Each sensor measures a specific traffic parameter in a given direction and time window. Common sensors include OHITUKSET (vehicle passings, unit kpl/h), KESKINOPEUS (average speed, unit km/h), and LIUKUVA_NOPEUS (rolling speed per lane, unit km/h).

value.description: Measured value in the sensor's native unit. Units vary by sensor: kpl/h for vehicle passings, km/h for speed measurements, and dimensionless ratios for traffic situation indicators.

time.description: Measurement timestamp as Unix epoch seconds (UTC). Indicates when the sensor reading was taken or last updated.

start.description: Start of the fixed time window for windowed aggregate sensors (e.g. 5-minute or 60-minute fixed windows), as Unix epoch seconds (UTC). Present for fixed-window sensors such as OHITUKSET_5MIN_KIINTEA and KESKINOPEUS_60MIN_KIINTEA. Null or absent for rolling-window and per-lane sensors.

end.description: End of the fixed time window for windowed aggregate sensors, as Unix epoch seconds (UTC). Present for fixed-window sensors. Null or absent for rolling-window and per-lane sensors.

schema.name: WeatherSensorData
schema.description: Road weather station sensor reading from the Finnish national road network operated by Fintraffic. Each message represents a single sensor measurement at a road weather station, delivered in real time via the Digitraffic MQTT stream at wss://tie.digitraffic.fi/mqtt on topic weather-v2/{stationId}/{sensorId}. Road weather stations measure parameters such as air temperature, road surface temperature, wind speed, humidity, dew point, and precipitation. Data is updated every minute. See https://www.digitraffic.fi/en/road-traffic/ for full documentation.

station_id.description: Road weather station numeric identifier as assigned by Fintraffic. There are over 350 road weather stations on the Finnish road network. Example: 1012.

sensor_id.description: Sensor identifier within the road weather station. Each sensor measures a specific weather or road surface parameter. Common sensors include ILMA (air temperature, unit °C), TIE_1 (road surface temperature, unit °C), KESKITUULI (average wind speed, unit m/s), KASTEPISTE (dew point, unit °C), and ILMAN_KOSTEUS (relative humidity, unit %).

value.description: Measured value in the sensor's native unit. Units vary by sensor: °C for temperatures, m/s for wind speed, % for relative humidity, mm for precipitation.

time.description: Measurement timestamp as Unix epoch seconds (UTC). Indicates when the sensor reading was taken.
